description: Local pre-S7 observation dataset for residual-capacity diagnosis. This is a small real run intended to produce training and evaluation observability artifacts, not a final accuracy contract.

forward_metadata.formal_baseline_selection_rule: temperature sweep RMFT pairing data, charge-balanced p≈0 branch, temperature_eV <= 1.0e-3, first 8 samples sorted by temperature

sampling_policy.description: Small local observation-focused design covering anchor, neighborhood, and bridge source roles across supported named directions and narrow spread, with explicit nuisance labels for grouped review.
